notes: SCN-003 ANDU London-open sweep — good-process-bad-outcome (stopped out). Seed 0xD5E6F7A8 = 3588683688. Player: leverage ack + hypothesis journal at tick 0. Player misreads the reversal as a failed bounce and enters SHORT at confirmation (~1.2810), placing a buy-stop-to-cover at 1.2850 (38 pips above entry) BEFORE entry. The authored trend pushes ANDU to 1.2870; stop-to-cover triggers at tick 412 (~1.2868). Process is fully correct: stop placed before entry, never widened, not manually cancelled — stop FILLS via trigger. Exit journal written, debrief completed. sessionHasWin=false (short entered ~1.2810, final close ~1.2862 > entry). No reckless_winner_flag. Total XP: 185. The key assertion: stop_honored fires on a losing run, proving process XP is independent of outcome. Regenerate digest: npx vitest run tests/_gen_digests.test.ts
